# GEM-pRF Citation Information

Source URL: https://gemprf.github.io/cite.html

# Cite
 Paper Citation Section 
## GEM-pRF Software & Methodology

To cite the GEM-pRF software or methodology, please cite our research paper published in Medical Image Analysis:

DOI badge injected by doi-badges.js

[Mittal et al. (2025), GEM-pRF: GPU-Empowered Mapping of Population Receptive Fields for Large-Scale fMRI Analysis](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.media.2025.103891)
 Documentation Website Section 
## Documentation Website

If you used the GEM-pRF documentation website (e.g., the XML configuration generator), you can cite it using the following DOI:

DOI badge injected by doi-badges.js

[Mittal et al. (2025), GEM-pRF Software Documentation for Population Receptive Field (pRF) Mapping](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18475202)
 Software Version Section 
## Software Version

When specifying the software version used in your research, please refer to the version number listed on the [GEM-pRF PyPI package manager](https://pypi.org/project/gemprf/) page. This ensures reproducibility and clarity about which version of the software was used.
